question: Comment communiquer les changements aux utilisateurs ?

principles.text: 2 tiers: page changelog persistante (historique complet) + notification in-app subtile (badge/dot, PAS modal bloquante) pour MAJ significatives. Modal uniquement pour breaking changes necessitant action utilisateur. Le changelog doit etre consultable a tout moment, la notification signale la nouveaute sans interrompre le flux.

sources.name: Appcues — Release Notes Best Practices
sources.quote: Persistent changelog page combined with subtle in-app notifications

sources.name: UserPilot — Release Notes UX
sources.quote: Avoid modal interruptions for non-critical updates

sources.name: UX Studio — Product Updates Communication
sources.quote: Badge notifications outperform modals for engagement

sources.name: AnnounceKit — Changelog Patterns
sources.quote: Two-tier approach: persistent page + widget notification

sources.name: Eleken — Modal UX Best Practices
sources.quote: Modals should be reserved for actions requiring user decision
